summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date - latest date only for each APU

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to filter by aircraft type
For each APU (identified by psn and serialno), select only the row with the maximum ref_date value
Filter rotables_trend records where trend_type equals CT5
acceptance_criteria: Query returns APU part numbers and serial numbers for all B737NG aircraft
Each APU is represented only once with its most recent CT5ATP trend value
All output fields are populated correctly from source tables
Query can be switched from AMOS Acceptance to AMOS Production when system goes live
VDS is created in Engine Folder as specified
Workorder information is included when present in rotables_trend
